raw_consumer_statement: This is regarding American Express dispute XXXX. They are XXXX towards me and believe the merchant over me because of my race. I have shown through photos already the product arrived DAMAGED. The merchant said they would get compensation from their insurance and then sent me a return label. I used their return label. I showed American Express the box I sent it back in. The merchants return carrier lost the return and sent it to another state but thats not my fault thats the merchants label and return carrier. Also I am owed my money back because I paid for a product that arrived damaged
